title: Bridge Essay: Central control of cardiac activity as assessed by intra-cerebral recordings and stimulations.
concept: Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**Central control of cardiac activity as assessed by intra-cerebral recordings and stimulations.** — Neurophysiol Clin (2023). DOI: 10.1016/j.neucli.2023.102849. PMID: 36867969. Some of the most important integrative control centers for the autonomic nervous system are located in the brainstem and the hypothalamus. However, growing recent neuroimaging evidence support that a set of cortical regions, named the central autonomic network (CAN), is involved in autonomic control and seems to play a major role in continuous autonomic cardiac adjustments to high-level emotional, cognitive or sensorimotor cortical activities.
